title: Energy Assessment
description: Capture the site's loads and consumption before designing anything.

steps.title: Tell us about the site
steps.description: The assessment feeds the design's load schedule.
steps.voiceScript: Describe the site. This becomes the load schedule your design is sized against.
steps.captionText: Describe the site. This becomes the load schedule your design is sized against.
steps.fallbackMessage: Tell us about the site: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Submit
steps.description: Our team reviews and returns a recommendation.
steps.voiceScript: Submit the assessment and we return a sizing recommendation.
steps.captionText: Submit the assessment and we return a sizing recommendation.
